# Vendored libraries (P3)

Committed copies — no CDN at runtime (CSP `default-src 'self'`, Security §4).

| File | Library | Version | Vendored | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| marked.min.js | marked | 15.0.12 | 2026-07-16 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked/marked.min.js |
| purify.min.js | DOMPurify | 3.4.12 | 2026-07-16 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js |
| jspdf.umd.min.js | jsPDF | 2.5.2 | 2026-07-16 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jspdf@2/dist/jspdf.umd.min.js |

To update: re-download, record the new version here, test the report render + PDF export paths.
